title: fih or shrim.
description: fih or shrim that adds shrimp and a fish from san diego
body:
adds shrimp to the game and a killer fish thats from san diego 
- FEATURES
- new craftable (killer fish from san diego)
- added a REALLY rare shrimp fishable
- u can cook and eat shrimp
- u can craft cooked shrimp into the new shrim weapon which is op
